MaxLineLength:AlarmRearm.kt$AlarmRearm$"Alarm send failed after several tries — long-press ALARM to wake the watch, then tap Retry in the notification"

MaxLineLength:ErrorNotifier.kt$ErrorNotifier$FailureKind.ALARM_UNREACHABLE -> "Couldn't push your next alarm to the watch after several tries — it won't ring until this succeeds. Long-press the ALARM button to wake the watch, then tap Retry."

MaxLineLength:ErrorNotifier.kt$ErrorNotifier$FailureKind.SUN_UNREACHABLE -> "Couldn't deliver the next sunrise/sunset after several tries. Long-press the ALARM button to wake your watch, then tap Retry."
MaxLineLength:ErrorNotifier.kt$ErrorNotifier$FailureKind.WATCH_UNREACHABLE -> "Couldn't reach your watch after several tries. Long-press the ALARM button to wake its Bluetooth, then tap Retry."
